## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss SEMrush Enterprise platform upgrade for GrowthX.ai and understand their current SEO workflow](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai currently uses SEMrush Business plan with 38 users, but may benefit from Enterprise features](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Current usage focuses mainly on keyword research; team seeks better configuration and reporting capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [SEMrush Enterprise offers customized workflows, dedicated support, and advanced AI/LLM tracking features](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Follow-up demo scheduled to showcase Enterprise platform tailored to GrowthX.ai's agency use case](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

## Topics

### Current SEMrush Usage at GrowthX.ai

  - [38 users on Business plan with additional projects and API access](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Primarily used for keyword research and basic site audits](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Team struggling with full platform utilization due to rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Many team members more familiar with Ahrefs, causing learning curve](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### SEMrush Enterprise Platform Overview

  - [Customizable solution with streamlined workflows for agencies](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Includes dedicated Customer Success Manager for onboarding and support](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Offers advanced features like forecasting, content optimization, and AI impact tracking](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Integrates Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4 data](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### GrowthX.ai's SEO Process and Needs

  - [Initial client strategy involves competitor analysis and gap identification](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Content creation uses a mix of AI and human experts](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Technical SEO audits performed periodically, but process not fully developed](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Interest in better progress reporting and share of voice tracking for clients](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### AI and LLM Concerns

  - [Clients increasingly inquiring about AI summaries and LLM chat mentions](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [SEMrush offers tools to track AI presence in SERPs and control brand messaging](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [4.5% decline in organic search attributed to LLMs, especially Google's Gemini](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)

### Potential Collaboration and Research

  - [Interest in partnering on white papers or studies using SEMrush data](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Possibility of creating custom reports on AI effects in search results](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

## Next Steps

  - [SEMrush team to prepare customized Enterprise platform demo for GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for April 22nd at 9:00 AM Pacific Time](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai to consider additional team members to invite to the demo](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [SEMrush to showcase workflows using Abnormal Security as an example client](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Explore potential for collaborative research projects using SEMrush data](https://fathom.video/share/dNkrkg1thmFM43EmeTvoZELQ-oLSCZoT?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
